query:
INSERT INTO product_variants (productId, variantCode, variantName, productionStatus, variantType, customerId, sellingPriceFOB, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
(60016, 'DC-001-B001', 'Gray upholstery darker shade', 'completed', 'exclusive', (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0), 72.00, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(60016, 'DC-001-B002', 'Custom backrest height 90cm', 'production', 'exclusive', (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 75.00, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(60016, 'DC-001-B003', 'Bulk order 100+ units', 'designing', 'exclusive', (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2), 58.00, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(60016, 'DC-001-B004', 'Premium fabric stain-resistant', 'completed', 'exclusive', (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3), 78.00, 1, NOW(), NOW());
